name: workplace_safety_school_district_s_new_cedar_ind_col
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Workplace Safety, the situation tagged internally around workplace safety school district new cedar ind col has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The organization’s past incidents make individual feel morally loud today, while collective is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Elena Berg
agents.identity: I am Elena Berg, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Workplace Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Jonah Hughes
agents.identity: I am Jonah Hughes, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Workplace Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on collective.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on collective for immediate traction on individual.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Elena Berg must choose under individual versus collective. What does Elena Berg do?
